name: coTfsTimingSDOStart
title: coTfsTimingSDOStart
description: This function is replaced by coTfsMonitorActivate.
tables: Obsolete Function This function is replaced by coTfsMonitorActivate.

The function starts the monitoring of SDO response times. The new values are added to the already saved values. The monitoring can be stopped or paused with coTfsTimingSDOStop. The monitoring is deactivated for all nodes on measurement start.
nodeId 0: for all nodes 1..127: for a special node
Example coTfsTimingSDOStart( 0 ); // start SDO time recording for all nodes
